name: 3M Co.
lede: 3M runs three centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Gurugram, covering R&D and CoE, built over fifteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one 3M office in India. We map every GCC center in the footprint, each tagged by type, function and city, so a name on a list becomes an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: 3M Co. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: 3M runs 3 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram), covering R&D and CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: COE Engineering & Site Leader (GCC Head) - Global Technology Center - 3M

about.description: 3M's India centers pair product engineering with shared-services and enterprise IT work. The footprint supports global product development, supply-chain analytics and enterprise IT for 3M's safety, transportation and healthcare businesses.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 26 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: 3M's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 1 additional city.

faq.a: 3M runs R&D and 1 additional center type in India.
